response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical leadership credentials with 20 years of experience and demonstrated seniority through multiple Staff Engineer roles, broad technical depth, and thought leadership in open source and education. However, the Principal Engineer role is specifically focused on AI Strategy with emphasis on "recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI." While his recent role at re:cinq (April 2025+) mentions AI-agent infrastructure and MCP work, this is too recent and limited to demonstrate the depth of AI/ML expertise the role requires. Additionally, he lacks a Master's or PhD in an AI-related field, lacks evidence of shipping AI products, and has limited demonstrated experience with strategic cloud platform architecture—all key requirements for advising strategic customers on "cutting-edge cloud and AI technologies." His profile is better suited to a principal engineer role in general software architecture rather than one specifically emphasizing AI strategy.
strengths: 20 years of diverse technical leadership across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains with multiple Staff-level roles
Demonstrated thought leadership through extensive open-source projects (GISCollective, Trial, Fluent-Asserts) and educational contributions (workshops, courses, talks)
Proven ability to work across disparate technology stacks and architect solutions in complex domains
concerns: No Master's or PhD in AI/ML field and limited demonstrated expertise in AI/machine learning despite role's emphasis on recognized AI expertise
Recent AI work (April 2025+) in MCP and AI-agent infrastructure is too nascent to demonstrate the depth of AI product or platform building this strategic role requires
Limited evidence of strategic cloud platform architecture expertise, business-level advisory experience, or work at the strategic customer/partner level needed for this Director-level IC role

key_factors.factor: 20+ years technical seniority with staff-level leadership
No advanced AI degree; lack of shipped AI products
